# Auto-generated project CMakeLists.txt (linux) for model: '{{ model_name }}'

cmake_minimum_required(VERSION 3.21)
project({{ model_name }}-{{ platform }})
set(CMAKE_CXX_STANDARD 17)

# Define where we can find the engine:
set(ROBOTICK_ENGINE_ROOT "${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/{{ robotick_engine_root }}" CACHE PATH "Path to engine root")

# Define platform macros
{% for macro in platform_macros %}
set({{ macro }} ON CACHE BOOL "Enable platform macro")
add_compile_definitions({{ macro }}=1)

{% endfor %}
# Add the robotick-engine as a buildable subproject
add_subdirectory(${ROBOTICK_ENGINE_ROOT} ${CMAKE_BINARY_DIR}/robotick_engine)

# Define the main executable
add_executable({{ model_name }}
    {{ model_name_safe }}_model.cpp
    {{ model_name_safe }}_main.cpp
)

# Enable symbol visibility for backtrace resolution
target_link_options({{ model_name }} PRIVATE -rdynamic)

# Ensure debug symbols are preserved
set(CMAKE_BUILD_TYPE RelWithDebInfo CACHE STRING "" FORCE)

# Create workload registry
add_library(workload_registry STATIC
    registry/generated_workload_registry.cpp
{% for source in platform_extra_cpp %}
    ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/{{ source }}
{% endfor %}
)

# Enforce strict compilation rules to help ensure code quality
target_compile_options(workload_registry PRIVATE -Wall -Wextra -Werror)
target_compile_options({{ model_name }} PRIVATE -Wall -Wextra -Werror)

{% for root in workload_roots %}
target_include_directories(workload_registry PRIVATE
    ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/{{ root }}
)
{% endfor %}

# Pull in aggregated deps (deduped from YAMLs)
set(ROBOTICK_MAIN_TARGET workload_registry)
set(ROBOTICK_EXECUTABLE_TARGET {{ model_name }})
include("${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/registry/generated_workload_deps.cmake")

# Link engine into workload registry
target_link_libraries(workload_registry PUBLIC robotick-engine)

# Link workload registry into main binary. Whole-archive keeps registration-only
# translation units (for enums/primitive helpers) from being dropped by the linker.
target_link_libraries({{ model_name }} PRIVATE
    -Wl,--whole-archive
    workload_registry
    -Wl,--no-whole-archive
)
